_note: 21:9 ultrawide cinematic landscape: epic environment shots, world reveals, exploration content. The 'EXPLORING THE NEW MAP' / 'THIS GAME IS BEAUTIFUL' / 'HIDDEN LOCATION FOUND' category. Default aspect 21:9 but works at 16:9 too. Character is small in frame — the WORLD is the star.
template: cinematic ultrawide landscape from {game}: {scene}, vast scale with {subject} small in the distance for scale, recognizable {game} world architecture and environment, {atmosphere}, {palette} palette, {lighting}, epic sweeping vista, film grain, anamorphic lens flare, professional cinematography, 8K detail
negative: text, letters, words, watermark, blurry, low quality, close-up, portrait, character filling frame, flat, boring, indoor, cramped
